final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: medical educational illustration, high-resolution print-ready
Primary request: 3D anatomical visualization of human cardiovascular system with cross-sectioned heart showing four chambers, valves, and major blood vessels
Scene/backdrop: deep dark background to make anatomical structures stand out clearly, minimal clinical environment
Subject: human heart cross-section revealing left/right atria and ventricles, aortic/pulmonary/mitral/tricuspid valves, aorta, pulmonary artery, superior/inferior vena cava; arterial system in bright red, venous system in deep blue, blood flow indicated by arrows with dynamic light effects
Style/medium: medical illustration in Netter Atlas style, modern 3D rendered texture, photorealistic anatomical accuracy
Composition/framing: central heart anatomy with surrounding vascular network, clear labeling space reserved, medical textbook layout
Lighting/mood: dramatic rim lighting highlighting anatomical contours, subtle internal glow for blood flow visualization, clinical precision mood
Color palette: arterial bright red, venous deep blue, coronary arteries highlighted in gold, dark charcoal background, anatomical tissue tones
Materials/textures: realistic myocardial fiber texture visible, glossy vascular surfaces, semi-translucent valve membranes, metallic gold for coronary highlights
Text (verbatim): "医疗健康科普插画"
Constraints: preserve Netter-style anatomical accuracy, maintain clear labeling areas, ensure color-coded vessel differentiation (red arteries/blue veins), coronary arteries must be gold-highlighted
Avoid: cartoonish simplification, incorrect anatomical proportions, cluttered composition, watermark, decorative elements that distract from educational purpose
